app.title: QualiProbe | AI-Powered Qualitative Research Insight Engine
app.subtitle: Making Research Design and Interview Analysis More Efficient and Systematic

studyType.label: Study Type
studyType.helper: Default is auto-detect. Manually choose if detection is inaccurate.

outline.disclaimerText: This interview outline is for research reference only. All personal information collected during the interview will be strictly confidential and used only for research purposes. Interview content will be analyzed and reported after anonymization.
outline.welcome: Welcome & Thanks: Thank you very much for taking your valuable time to participate in this interview.
outline.selfIntro: Self-introduction: I am [Name], the interviewer today from [Company Name].
outline.purposeExplanation: Purpose Explanation: We hope to understand your real experience and thoughts through today's conversation.
outline.confidentialityCommitment: Confidentiality Commitment: All your responses will be strictly confidential and used only for research purposes. No personal information will appear in the report.
outline.recordingNotice: Recording Notice: To ensure accuracy, I will record the interview. Do you agree?
outline.openingQuestion: Opening Question: Let's start with your initial experience with the relevant topic.
outline.conclusionText: Thank you for your time and sharing. Your perspectives are very valuable to our research. If you have any other thoughts, feel free to add them. Wish you a happy life!
outline.researchPurposePlaceholder: e.g., Understand user habits and pain points with the product

analysis.analysisDescription: Upload interview transcripts, AI will automatically generate deep insight reports
analysis.waitingForTranscript: Waiting for transcript import to start analysis
analysis.transcriptImportPrompt: Please upload or paste interview transcript content on the right, and the system will automatically generate deep insight analysis reports.

agent.title: AI Expert Assistant
agent.placeholder: Ask about outline optimization, transcript analysis, or enter modification instructions...

errors.templateUploadFailed: Template upload failed, please check file format
errors.conversationFailed: Conversation failed, please try again later
errors.fillRequiredFields: Please fill in complete research information

workspace.researchTopicPlaceholder: e.g., Impact of smart homes on elderly quality of life
workspace.researchPurposePlaceholder: e.g., Understand smart home usage experience and needs
